de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util

Class SymbolicExecutionUtil.ContractPostOrExcPostExceptionVariableResult

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.util.SymbolicExecutionUtil.ContractPostOrExcPostExceptionVariableResult
  • Enclosing class:
    SymbolicExecutionUtil

    public static class SymbolicExecutionUtil.ContractPostOrExcPostExceptionVariableResult
extends Object
    The result of SymbolicExecutionUtil.searchContractPostOrExcPostExceptionVariable(Node, Services).

    Martin Hentschel
